commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens plugin/tool/schema metadata hardening across Codex, Gateway MCP, agents, providers, plugin SDK, outbound actions, and shared normalization, adding synthetic fuzz regression tests and quarantine/fail-closed behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. `buildMcpToolSchema` still reaches `flattenUnionSchema`, which reads nested union fields without bounded access, so a synthetic `anyOf` branch with throwing `properties` or `required` getters would still reproduce the `tools/list` failure path; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Draft/protected PR needs branch-owner or maintainer handling for the MCP blocker plus the broad fail-closed compatibility and auth-provider decisions.
